title: stellaria chinensis var. omeiensis
intro: Stellaria chinensis var. omeiensis, also known as Omei Stellaria or Snow Lotus, is a variety of flowering plant in the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help with wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Stellaria chinensis var. omeiensis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
